# HSD 16030319119: [DMR][X4 VIS][RACL] Unexpected current throttling on both IMHs after reset.

## Root Cause Summary

Collaterals
:

X4:

Platform: AN004022BMH2325.amr.corp.intel.com

IFWI: OKSDREL1_86B_2026.15.3.01_0034.D13_8000099C_0.794.0_1P0_NonIPClean_NoTrace_DebugSigned_VIS.bin

Summary

:

RACL_PERF_STATUS is reporting unexpected throttling at imh0 and imh1 after platform is booted without any workload.

PLR_DIE_LEVEL is reporting current,frequency and ICCMAX as throttling causes.

consumed current after reset is well bellow TDC limits set.

Issue reproduced on multiple platforms.
